papers.title: PALS: Power-Aware LLM Serving for Mixture-of-Experts Models
papers.summary: Presents a power-aware runtime for LLM serving that treats GPU power caps as a controllable resource and jointly tunes them with batch size. It integrates with vLLM and evaluates dense and MoE models on multi-GPU systems.
papers.reason: 近 30 天 LLM 推理系统：MoE serving、GPU 功耗控制、vLLM 集成和 QoS 违约率都直接对应 2026 年 AI 基建成本问题。

papers.title: DroidSpeak: KV Cache Sharing Across Fine-tuned Model Variants
papers.summary: Studies KV cache sharing across fine-tuned model variants in multi-LLM serving. DroidSpeak selectively recomputes sensitive layers and reuses the remaining KV cache to cut redundant prefill work.
papers.reason: 2026 NSDI / Microsoft 参与的推理系统：多模型协作、KV cache 共享、fine-tuned variants 和 agentic workflow 都是大厂线上服务会遇到的问题。

papers.title: QoServe: Breaking the Silos of LLM Inference Serving
papers.summary: Introduces a QoS-driven LLM inference serving system for co-scheduling diverse latency classes on shared GPU infrastructure. It uses fine-grained QoS classification, dynamic chunking and hybrid prioritization to improve utilization under overload.
papers.reason: 2026 ASPLOS / Microsoft Research：把 interactive 与 batch 推理从资源孤岛里合并调度，适合看大厂 AI 服务的 SLO、goodput 和过载降级。

papers.title: ForkKV: Scaling Multi-LoRA Agent Serving via Copy-on-Write Disaggregated KV Cache
papers.summary: Uses an OS-like fork and copy-on-write memory model for multi-LoRA agent serving, splitting KV cache into a shared base component and lightweight agent-specific parts with a custom ResidualAttention kernel.
papers.reason: 近 90 天 LLM 推理系统：多 LoRA agent serving、KV cache 分离、copy-on-write 和定制 kernel，适合和 DroidSpeak 对照看。

papers.title: StreamWise: Serving Multi-Modal Generation in Real-Time at Scale
papers.summary: Studies real-time multi-modal generation serving at scale, coordinating LLMs, text-to-speech, image, audio and video generation under latency, cost and quality constraints with adaptive scheduling and heterogeneous hardware.
papers.reason: 2026 Microsoft/Azure Research 推理服务系统：从纯 LLM 扩到多模态生成链路，重点是 SLO、异构资源调度、成本和实时流式体验。

papers.title: ReviveMoE: Fast Recovery for Hardware Failures in Large-Scale MoE LLM Inference Deployments
papers.summary: Targets failure recovery for large-scale MoE inference deployments, avoiding full serving-instance restarts when hardware failures occur. The system is integrated with Huawei Cloud's MaaS stack and xDeepServe platform.
papers.reason: 2026 Huawei Cloud 大规模 MoE 推理部署：关注硬件故障恢复、MaaS 稳定性和 xDeepServe 生产栈，属于线上服务可靠性方向。

papers.title: DistServe: Disaggregating Prefill and Decoding for Goodput-optimized Large Language Model Serving
papers.summary: Separates prefill and decode onto different GPU groups and optimizes placement under latency SLOs, improving goodput for LLM serving workloads with different prompt and output lengths.
papers.reason: LLM 推理经典轮换：prefill/decode disaggregation 是 2024 以后推理系统很重要的工程方向。
